item.description: Commercial shipping through the key route remains severely disrupted.

item.description: The former champion’s victim threw in the towel when he ‘immediately reacted like ‘my jaw is broken’’.

item.description: The DJR star came from behind pole to atone for his frustrations earlier in the weekend.

item.description: The 16-year-old accused of killing Layla Jeffery refused a key police request.

item.description: The family of Jana Armstrong were already reeling from a devastating tragedy.

item.description: The 80-year-old is speaking out to save others from the same heartbreak.

item.title: Bombshell as Brendon McCullum sacked as England Test coach
item.description: The Bazball era appears all but over with the coach following Ben Stokes out the door.

item.description: Shocking footage circulating online shows the huge blaze raging and plumes of smoke pouring out of the pub’s front door.

item.description: The 17-year-old’s disappointment was palpable even as Lleyton and Bec lifted him up after a brilliant week.

item.description: The superstar was ruthless on his way to back-to-back titles, but he knew exactly what he had to do when his hurting rival hit the deck.

item.description: The US Senator had only just returned from Ukraine when he suddenly died.

item.description: The celebrity chef shared the flaky family pie he grew up eating.

item.description: This vibrant mango mud crab curry proves native ingredients deserve a place in every Australian kitchen.

item.description: From homemade fruit roll-ups to crispy veggie chips and cheesy chicken pinwheels, Sarah Di Lorenzo shares healthier snack ideas the whole family can enjoy.

item.description: ‘Everyone is carrying a story we cannot see.’

item.title: Home And Away star Maddison Brown makes surprise wedding announcement
item.description: ‘I don’t know what I would do without him.’

item.title: Junction Oval to host historic Big Bash League clash on Christmas Eve
item.description: The Big Bash will break new ground this year to give fans an early Christmas present.

item.title: AFL trade bombshell as Geelong make bold play for Essendon veteran Zach Merrett
item.description: The rival coach is leading the charge by sending a direct message to the star player.

item.title: Farmer Wants A Wife contestant Mieke reveals surprise phone call from Zac after elimination
item.description: Farmer Zac chose Maya, but Mieke says their story didn’t end when the cameras stopped rolling.

item.title: Lavanya Chappa, fatally stabbed in Melbourne’s Vermont, remembered as 'loving mother'
item.description: A shocked community is grieving a mother who was killed with a knife in an alleged domestic homicide, leaving two children behind.

item.description: ‘It’s just hard to wrap my head around why this would be thought to be a suitable location.’

item.title: Yemen’s Houthis strike Saudi Arabia’s Abha airport in retaliation for strikes on Sanaa airport
item.description: Shocking footage published by Houthi-controlled media shows strikes battering Yemen’s airport earlier in the day, ending a period of ‘de-escalation’.

item.description: Brendon McCullum ‘can only say sorry’, but has found a ‘romantic’ silver lining to his sacking.

item.description: ‘He really didn’t have much belief he would make the final kind of tells it’s own story.’

item.description: ‘We’ll become the guardian of the strait ... And we should be reimbursed’.

item.title: Appeal to identify further potential victims as former Sydney childcare worker charged with heinous crimes
item.description: Hamish Tait is accused of 329 offences allegedly committed over 16 years.

item.description: The ship was mid-voyage when the tragedy occurred.

item.description: ‘At the bottom of the camera, it even said it’s a person.’

item.description: Prince Harry’s behaviour during his visit to the UK has caused so much tension between him and his father King Charles, the monarch is planning to reduce his son’s inheritance.

item.description: The four-time premiership coach has only one thing on his mind ... and he’s going to give it his all.

item.description: A popular food chain is under investigation over claims it may be linked to the rapid spread of a parasite which can cause ‘explosive’ diarrhoea, which is now estimated to be impacting more than 7000 people.

item.description: A Como resident has been told he will need to pay if he wants an old disconnected Telstra box on his verge removed, even though he doesn’t own the equipment or the land.

item.title: 7NEWS live updates: Driver ‘unaccounted for’ after horror collision on major highway
item.description: Follow along as we bring you all of the big crime, traffic and weather updates.

item.title: Argentina find England goalkeeper Jordan Pickford’s notes after World Cup semi-final
item.description: Lionel Messi was very amused by the find and the fitness boss dropped a stinging message which he later deleted.

item.title: Range Rover Sport Electric revealed at Goodwood Festival of Speed
item.description: The Range Rover Sport will soon gain an electric variant, with most drivetrain components reportedly shared with the Range Rover Electric.

item.title: ‘I knew I’d end up on the news’: Domestic violence survivor’s warning as Australia confronts another week of alleged killings
item.description: ‘I might as well have had a collar and a lead on. He took my bank cards, my phone, wiped my social media. From then on, I basically needed permission to breathe.’

item.title: Why 20-year-old photo of Argentina’s football great Lionel Messi has gone viral
item.description: ‘If you wrote this in a film, it would not seem possible.’

item.title: Trump’s teleprompter operator suspended for allegedly betting on president’s speeches
item.description: The aide is accused of using inside knowledge to collect a life-changing windfall.

item.title: Are Grammy nominees for Best New Artist industry plants?
item.description: The move has reignited fierce debate about what it means to be a breakthrough artist and why so many musicians are being accused of manufactured success.

item.title: Ford Transit, Transit Custom and Tourneo recalled
item.description: The eight-speed automatic transmission in some Ford models may unexpectedly lose first or reverse gear.

item.title: Real reason for England superstar Jude Bellingham’s ugly World Cup slap emerges
item.description: Fresh vision of the moment has come to light and the tables have suddenly turned.

item.title: ‘Hazardous’ health warnings issued in New Jersey and New York ahead of World Cup final
item.description: One game was called off as doctors urged players and people to get inside, but Spain still carried on.

item.title: Parents of teen poisoned in Laos ‘crushed’ over lack of justice as government steps in
item.description: ‘I don’t even think devastated is a strong enough word.’
